## Summary

Describe the problem and the proposed solution.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New module
- [ ] Public API change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling or CI

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`

## Safety review

- [ ] Detection remains separate from enforcement.
- [ ] Configuration values are validated.
- [ ] Stateful modules support scoped reset.
- [ ] Tests cover false-positive and threshold behavior.

## Notes

Document compatibility or migration considerations.
